hero.greeting: Hi, I am Diego Alejandro Botina
hero.titlePrefix: From the Fields of Buga to the
hero.subtitle: Software Engineer | System Architect | Commercial Software Engineering Student at Jala University
hero.description: With an insatiable hunger for innovation, I dream of creating a universal operating system and a programming language that combines the simplicity of natural language with the efficiency of C and Assembly. Putting Colombia in the elite of cutting-edge technology.

about.title: My Story
about.subtitle: A journey from the fields of Buga to the technological vanguard
about.story1: I am Diego Alejandro Botina Herrera, known as Alejandro or simply Botina. I was born on February 1, 2007, in Guadalajara de Buga, Valle del Cauca, Colombia. My roots are rural — both my mom and dad grew up in the countryside, and I was fortunate to live in that environment before moving to a more urban place where I discovered my passion for technology.
about.story2: I studied at the Institución Educativa Nuestra Señora de Fátima, where I graduated with honors as the student with the highest ICFES score of my generation, recognized for my academic commitment and contributions to the institution. I obtained technical degrees in Agriculture and Local Tourism Operation, in addition to my Computer Systems technician degree.
about.quote: The saddest thing in life is wasted talent, and the choices you make will shape your life forever.
about.story3: This quote sums up my philosophy: I will not waste my talent. My parents provided me with their emotional and financial support, and I have arrived with my head held high today, proud of who I am and with a future that I do not intend to waste.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To create technology that inspires and transforms. My dreams include developing a universal operating system and a revolutionary programming language.

loyalty.title: Loyalty
loyalty.description: I value loyalty, respect, and commitment above all else. I believe in building lasting relationships based on mutual trust.

determination.title: Determination
determination.description: With an insatiable hunger for knowledge, I am willing to sacrifice and work hard to achieve my goals and not waste my talent.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: Graduated with honors in every educational stage, I always seek excellence in everything I do, from code to human relationships.

m1.title: Born in Buga, Valle del Cauca
m1.description: I grew up in the countryside, connected to my peasant roots.

m2.title: Graduated with High School Honors
m2.description: Highest ICFES score in my school. Agricultural Technician and Local Tourism Operation Technician (SENA).

m3.title: Computer Systems Technician

m4.title: Jala University
m4.description: I started my career in Commercial Software Engineering with a concentration in Design and Architecture.

contact.title: Let's Connect
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Want to collaborate? Let's talk!
contact.description: I am always open to new opportunities, collaborations, and interesting conversations. Whether you have a question, a project proposal, or just want to connect, don't hesitate to reach out!
contact.collabDescription: I am always looking for new challenges and opportunities to grow. If you have an exciting project, an innovative idea, or just want to chat about technology, I will be happy to hear from you.
